commit.message:
Fix game hang by correcting CPU branch timing

Branch taken (+1) and page-crossing (+2) cycle penalties were lost because
branch() incremented this.cycles but execute() overwrote it with the base
cost. Use a branchPenalty field that gets added after execute() returns.
Also remove temporary debug instrumentation from PPU and NesEmulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add component diagram in draw.io format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game hang after screensaver by delivering APU frame counter IRQs to CPU

The APU's isIrqPending() was never checked in the main loop, so games
relying on APU IRQs for timing (e.g. Double Dragon & Battletoads) would
spin indefinitely waiting for an interrupt that never fired.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add APU implementation for sound support

Implement NES Audio Processing Unit with pulse, triangle, and noise
channels, wired into the CPU bus and main emulation loop. Audio output
uses javax.sound.sampled at 44100 Hz.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game freeze after title screen by adding NMI edge detection, PRG RAM, and DMA NMI handling

- Trigger NMI immediately when game enables NMI via PPUCTRL while VBlank is active
- Add 8KB PRG RAM at $6000-$7FFF so game state reads/writes work correctly
- Check for NMI during DMA transfer to avoid missing VBlank interrupts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement Extended Link Opaque LSA parser and database detail display

- Parse Extended Link TLV (RFC 7684 §3) with Adj-SID (RFC 8665 §5)
  and LAN Adj-SID (RFC 8665 §6) Sub-TLVs
- Add show database detail output for Extended Link LSAs
- Clean up remaining debug println statements in ifsm.rs and inst.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

add GitHub Pages workflow, switch from legacy to Actions deploy

commit.message:
fix: $ is not defined + kakao is not defined 오류 수정

- nav.php: $(function)→DOMContentLoaded + $.get→fetch (jQuery 로드 전 실행 문제)
- header.php: $load_kakao_maps 플래그 시 <head>에 Kakao SDK 주입 지원
- location_my_view.php: $load_kakao_maps=true 설정, 하단 Kakao SDK 태그 제거
- location_dashboard_view.php: 동일 패턴 적용

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: column mapping dropdowns misalign with table on short statements

With few rows, table-layout: auto + width: 100% caused the browser to
stretch each column beyond 180px to fill the container. The sticky
dropdown row used fixed 180px flex items, so they fell out of sync.

Switching to table-layout: fixed + width: auto makes the table exactly
as wide as its column definitions (matching the flex row exactly),
regardless of viewport width or row count.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: use explicit column selection in classes API to avoid schema mismatch

The Drizzle schema defines primaryCoursebookId (from FRESH_0028 migration)
but the column doesn't exist in the database yet. Using .select() without
explicit columns caused queries to fail with "column does not exist" errors.

Changed PUT, PATCH, and DELETE handlers to select only the columns they need,
which avoids the missing column issue and is more efficient.

commit.message:
Add attendee auth + pre-polling analysis

Key findings:
- My Questions tab is broken (in-memory, lost on refresh)
- Upvotes have no deduplication (can spam after refresh)
- Pre-polling accidentally works (join page never checks starts_at)
- No competitor requires attendee login

Recommendation: localStorage UUID for Tier 1 identity (zero friction),
optional email claim for Tier 2, host-controlled auth for Tier 3.

commit.message:
Distinguish auto-queued vs manual lock for vote visibility

Auto-queued songs (matched by lastPreQueuedId) show votes but disable
voting. Manual DJ locks hide votes entirely. Applies to both guest
and owner pages. Uses room.lastPreQueuedId instead of position-based
heuristic.

fix: signaling identity verification + passcode enforcement + group UX + Nova integration

Security:
- Signaling server now issues secp256k1 challenge-response on every connect
- Client signs nonce with private key; server verifies via pubkey recovery
- Spoofed 'from' addresses are rejected and the connection is terminated

UX:
- Passcode minimum raised from 6 to 8 characters
- Group sender labels now green-dim and 11px (was 10px muted, hard to read)
- Group chat preview in HomePage shows nickname + handles voice notes/tombstones
- Added 'open nova' button to null HomePage header
- Nova TopBar shows 'null: 0x...' badge when null identity is detected, links back

Roadmap:
- Added ROADMAP.md with forward secrecy (v0.3.0) and known limitations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Classify DivByZeroReturnsNullopt → §11.4.3 [skip ci]

§11.4.3 (Arithmetic operators) states that for the division operator, if the second operand is zero the entire result value shall be x. For real operands no x value exists, making the result unspecified — the behavior the test captures by expecting nullopt from ConstEvalReal on 1.0 / 0.0.

commit.message:
feat(books): add OpenLibrary-powered AddBook screen for owners

There was no way to add books to the library from within the app.
This commit introduces a full owner-only Add Book flow: a search
screen queries the OpenLibrary Search API and shows results with
cover thumbnails; selecting a result pre-fills a form with title,
author, genre, cover image, and page count. The owner then sets
reading status (Currently Reading or Finished), the relevant date,
rating (for finished books), notes, and favourite flag before saving.

Also fixes BookDetailScreen crashing on currently-reading books
(dateRead was null), and adds a + button to the BookList header
that is only visible to authenticated owners.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(publicacoes+financeiro): redesign cards publicações, extração de partes e fixes financeiro

Publicações:
- Redesign completo dos cards: borda lateral colorida por status, snippet
  de conteúdo, partes com cores semânticas (azul=ativo, vermelho=passivo)
- Métricas no padrão stat-card (gradiente) igual a Prazos/Audiências/Processos
- CSP compliance: todos os onclick inline substituídos por event delegation
- extrairPartes reescrita: separador estrito (:/-/–), filtro de termos
  jurídicos, suporte a 'Polo Ativo NOME' (sem dois-pontos), 'NOME (PAPEL)',
  labels concatenados sem espaço (PEREIRAAdvogado→corta antes de Advogado),
  fallback NOME X NOME com suporte a S/A e LTDA., INTIMADO/CITADO/PARTES
- HTML escape (esc()) no snippet e nomes das partes para evitar quebra de innerHTML

Financeiro:
- Botão Imprimir sempre usa o mês visível na tela (não trava em março)
- Relatório inclui nome do cliente (Receitas) e beneficiário (Despesas)
  abaixo da descrição na tabela de lançamentos

commit.message:
fix: scanner stabiliteit + image pipeline + pairing kwaliteit

SCANNER:
- Server retries: 6→4, kortere backoff (past binnen 60s maxDuration)
- Semaphore timeout: 50s→35s (meer headroom)
- Client retries: 5 pogingen met jitter

IMAGE PIPELINE:
- product-image: Sharp lazy import (voorkomt cold start 500 errors)
- product-image: fallback naar origineel als Sharp niet beschikbaar
- upload-image: invalideer v2 cache bij nieuwe upload (geen stale images)

PAIRING:
- Threshold: 0.4→0.55 (voorkomt fout koppelen op alleen timing)
- Timing bonus: alleen als naam-match > 0.15 (twee totaal andere games koppelen niet meer)
- ProductCode match: +0.8 bonus (AGB-BPEE op voor+achterkant = 100% match)
- Back rotatie: wordt nu daadwerkelijk toegepast bij push (was opgeslagen maar genegeerd)

commit.message:
feat: UX P2 — hints, error messages, silent failure fixes (#89)

* feat: UX improvements — hints, error messages, and silent failure fixes

Theme D (Post-operation hints):
- Add 'xv get' hint after secret creation
- Add 'xv restore' hint after secret deletion
- Add permanent warning after purge
- Add vault usage hint after vault creation
- Add blob recovery hint after file deletion
- Add original-name access hint for hashed secret names

Theme C (Error messages):
- Improve PermissionDenied to suggest RBAC roles and 'xv vault roles'
- Improve empty table message to mention permissions/filters
- Fix DNS fallback to show URL context instead of 'unknown-vault'
- Add 429/rate-limit detection to retry logic
- Change 'Unimplemented format' to proper error (from previous PR)

Theme F (Silent failures):
- Make 'xv file sync' return proper error instead of silent Ok(())
- Warn on empty file upload (0 bytes)
- Validate Azure blob tag limit (max 10) before upload
